findings.message: The final self-review checklist in `verification.md` is still unchecked (`- [ ]` on five items). The briefing explicitly requires all checkboxes in this artifact to be `[x]`, so the verification record still says completion is pending in one section while claiming completion elsewhere.

`verification.md` gives two different status values for T013: the Scope Verified section uses the full `Accepted (Phase 1 complete: tddd-01-multilayer-2026-04-12 + tddd-02-usecase-wiring-2026-04-14)` string, but the Result table shortens it to `Accepted (Phase 1 complete)`. That is status drift inside the final verification artifact.
